# Minecart Braking

Added a braking function to the minecart.

## Loader

[![Fabric](https://img.shields.io/badge/Available%20for-Fabric-dbd0b4?logo=data:image/png;base64,)](https://fabricmc.net)

## Environment

![ServerAndClient](https://img.shields.io/badge/Side-Server%20and%20Client-3c8527)

## Releases

[![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/badge/Published%20in-Modrinth-1bd96a?logo=modrinth&logoColor=white)](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecart-braking)
[![CurseForge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Published%20in-CurseForge-f16436?logo=curseforge&logoColor=white)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/minecart-braking)

## Compatibility

- Fabric API (Required)

## Progress

Check out the latest development progress here. [Development Progress](https://windysky.gitbook.io/main/minecraft/minecart-braking/version)

## Features

- When riding a minecart, pressing the **Left Alt** key on the keyboard will allow you to quickly stop the minecart, even on powered rails.
- The default key is left Alt, but you can change the brake key in the game settings.
